items.author: NYT Business
items.text: TrumpRx Adds Generic Drugs, With Mark Cuban, GoodRx and Amazon
items.summary: President Trump announced the addition of 600 medicines to his online drugstore as he appeals to Americans concerned about high drug prices and affordability.
items.text_it: TrumpRx aggiunge farmaci generici, con Mark Cuban, GoodRx e Amazon
items.summary_it: Il presidente Trump ha annunciato l'aggiunta di 600 farmaci alla sua farmacia online mentre fa appello agli americani preoccupati per i prezzi elevati dei farmaci e l'accessibilità economica.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: New York Times Sues Pentagon for a Second Time
items.summary: The Times is challenging a new requirement that reporters covering the military complex have an official escort, part of a broader legal challenge to the Pentagon’s press restrictions.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Federal Prosecutors Move to Drop Bribery Case Against Indian Magnate
items.summary: Gautam Adani had been accused of lying to American investors about payoffs in India. The end of the case came as President Trump has signaled a transactional approach to justice.

items.text: Musk loses case against OpenAI after two hours of jury deliberations
items.summary: Decision hands a legal victory to Sam Altman in a case that had overshadowed the AI lab’s plans to go public

items.text: Trump says he is holding off attack on Iran planned for Tuesday
items.summary: US president says UAE, Saudi Arabia and Qatar requested Washington suspend operation ‘for two or three days’
items.text_it: Trump dice che sta tenendo a bada l'attacco all'Iran previsto per martedì

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Lululemon hits back at its founder after months of attacks, saying he’s just jealous
items.summary: Lululemon says Chip Wilson has “coveted” the company since he left, and that his vision “appears to be frozen in time.”
